resources.string: Check your sleep duration based on age category. This app helps determine whether your sleep is enough, lack, or excessive and provides health tips.
Children : 6 - 12 years old Teenager : 13 - 18 years old Adult : 19 - 60 years old
Children need 9-11 hours of sleep. Try sleeping earlier, avoid gadgets before sleep, and maintain consistent bedtime routine.
Sleep duration is good for children. Maintain this sleep pattern for optimal growth and better concentration.
Sleep duration is excessive. Encourage physical activity and reduce long naps during the day.
Teenagers need 8-10 hours sleep. Avoid staying up late, reduce phone usage, and sleep before 11 PM.
Sleep duration is ideal. Maintain consistent sleep schedule to improve productivity.
Sleep duration is excessive. Try waking up earlier and doing light exercise. Avoid long daytime sleep.
Adults need 7-9 hours sleep. Avoid caffeine at night, relax before sleep, and reduce screen time.
Sleep duration is ideal for adults. Maintain healthy sleep routine for better health.
Sleep duration is excessive. Reduce naps and increase morning activities. Stay active during the day.
